_note: TEMPLATE — canonical NON-SECRET tenant identity for a Hawaii Wing SENIORS Apps Script project. Copy the values into TENANT_* Script Properties (or run setupHiwgSeniorsScriptProperties() in config-tenants/setup-hiwg.gs). Fields marked FILL_IN must be supplied by Hawaii Wing; the rest are pre-set. Do NOT put these in config.gs — a clasp push overwrites it. Secrets (SA_PRIVATE_KEY, XT_PEER_SA_KEY, CAPWATCH_AUTHORIZATION) are NOT stored here — see docs/ADMIN_GUIDE.md.
_behavioral_note: TENANT_PROFILE=seniors selects senior behavior (SENIOR/FIFTY YEAR/INDEFINITE/CADET SPONSOR member types, access + public-contact list auto-create, full squadron distribution lists). No config.gs edits needed.
_label_note: TENANT_WING_ABBREVIATION and TENANT_WING_NAME are left blank on purpose: config.gs derives 'HIWG' and 'Hawaii Wing' from TENANT_WING=HI automatically (WING_ABBREVIATION_ / WING_NAMES_). Set them only if a different label is wanted.
_xt_note: If Hawaii runs cross-tenant contacts (publish the CADET roster into this senior GAL), set XT_PEER_DOMAIN to the cadet Workspace domain and configure the peer read-only service account (XT_PEER_SA_EMAIL/SUBJECT via setupCrossTenantConfig(), XT_PEER_SA_KEY by hand). Otherwise leave XT_PEER_DOMAIN blank.
